metadata.title: Ground truth: NTC thermistor divider at 25 C and 50 C
metadata.description: NTC 10k thermistor (NTCLE100E3103, R25=10k, B25/85=3977K) modelled as a parameterized resistor in a divider off a 5V rail with a fixed 10k lower leg. The thermistor value is its resistance at the temperature under test: at 25 C, R = R25 = 10k (exact by definition, R/R25 = 1), giving a 2.500V tap. The sibling circuit thermistor_divider_hot exercises the resistance-vs-temperature shift at 50 C. This is a BEHAVIORAL parameterized-resistor stand-in, not a datasheet thermal SPICE model.
metadata.author: issue-105

test.description: Thermistor at 25 C: R = R25 = 10k (exact), tap = 2.500V.
